Travel governance platform

Wrap your travel in 360° visibility.

Cinturon360 connects to where your people already book, applies policy and approvals, and delivers finance-grade reporting for corporate, government, education, and travel partners.

Works with GDS/NDC, direct suppliers, and travel agents. No rip-and-replace.

Book a Demo Join Waitlist

Works with the travel ecosystem you already use

Control, approvals, and visibility across your travel stack

Cinturon360 connects to existing booking channels, applies policy and approval workflows, and gives finance and operations teams a single view of spend, exceptions, and audit.

🛡️
Governance

Policy and Approval Workflows

Route bookings to the right approvers before spend is committed. Apply rules by entity, team, traveller, cost centre, destination, supplier, fare cap, or exception path.

  • Pre-trip approvals
  • Cost-centre routing
  • Out-of-policy handling
  • Full audit trail
Learn More
🔗
Integrations

Works with Your Existing Booking Ecosystem

Cinturon360 is not a rip-and-replace online booking tool. It wraps around your current channels so you can govern bookings made through TMCs, GDS/NDC, direct suppliers, and other connected sources.

  • GDS and NDC support
  • TMC connectors
  • Direct supplier flows
  • Expense and ERP handoff
Explore Integrations
📊
Reporting

Finance-Grade Reporting and Visibility

Give travel, finance, procurement, and leadership teams a clear picture of spend, compliance, exceptions, and operational activity across the organisation.

  • Spend visibility
  • Compliance reporting
  • Exception monitoring
  • Export-ready data
See Reporting
Who we serve

Built for every tier of managed travel

From enterprise TMCs to leisure travel advisors, Cinturon360 provides the governance layer that modern travel programs need.

🏢

Travel Management Companies

Built for TMCs that need a stronger platform for client onboarding, policy control, approvals, integrations, reporting, and operational oversight at scale.

Client management Policy control Scale
Learn more
💼

Corporate Travel Programs

Designed for organisations that want clearer control over travel approvals, spend visibility, compliance, and reporting across existing booking channels.

Approvals Spend visibility Compliance
Learn more
🏛️

Government & Controlled Environments

Suitable for travel environments that require stronger governance, structured approvals, full auditability, and more defensible operational visibility.

Audit-grade Defensible Structured
Learn more
✈️

Leisure & High-Net-Worth Travel

Governance and visibility tools for premium and complex leisure travel programs — structured oversight for travel advisors managing discerning clients who expect precision, discretion, and quality.

Premium programs Advisor tools Structured oversight
Learn more

Cinturon360 is coming soon

Cinturon360 is an upcoming travel governance and visibility platform designed to work with existing booking channels, apply policy and approvals, and deliver finance-grade reporting. Join the waitlist to follow the launch.
